title: coccinia cordifolia
intro: Coccinia cordifolia, also known as ivy gourd or baby woodrose, is a perennial climber belonging to the Cucurbitaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its diverse medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coccinia cordifolia include treating fever, sore throat, and various skin conditions, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Coccinia cordifolia include decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various ailments.
